Enumeration# Conversation.Event

Values that tell the system what happened during a conversation.iOS 17.4+iPadOS 17.4+Mac Catalyst 17.4+visionOS 1.1+watchOS 10.4+

```
enum Event
```

## [Topics](/documentation/livecommunicationkit/conversation/event#topics)

## [Discussion](/documentation/livecommunicationkit/conversation/event#discussion)

#### [Events](/documentation/livecommunicationkit/conversation/event#Events)

[`case conversationConnected(Date)`](/documentation/livecommunicationkit/conversation/event/conversationconnected(_:))Informs that system that conversation successfully connected at a point in time.[`case conversationEnded(Date, Conversation.EndedReason)`](/documentation/livecommunicationkit/conversation/event/conversationended(_:_:))Informs that system that a conversation ended at a point in time with a reason.[`case conversationStartedConnecting(Date)`](/documentation/livecommunicationkit/conversation/event/conversationstartedconnecting(_:))Informs the system that a conversation has started to connect participants at a point in time.[`case conversationUpdated(Conversation.Update)`](/documentation/livecommunicationkit/conversation/event/conversationupdated(_:))Updates a conversation’s attributes and capabilities.## [Relationships](/documentation/livecommunicationkit/conversation/event#relationships)
